title: A Jamaican football star has her best year ever
text: Khadija Shaw, who people call Bunny, is a football player from Jamaica. This year she scored more goals than ever before. People all over Jamaica are proud of her. She shows that practice and hard work can take you very far.

title: A man climbs the tallest mountain in the world
text: Paul Hodge wanted to do something very hard and very brave. So he climbed Mount Everest, the tallest mountain on Earth. It was cold and steep, but he did not give up. He reached the top and showed that big dreams are worth trying for.

title: A dance group celebrates 25 years of joy
text: Boy Blue is a dance group in Britain. This year they celebrate 25 years of dancing together. They teach young people to dance and to believe in themselves. Their new show is full of music, movement, and happiness.
